---
title: Wrangling The Academia Theme
author: Hywel Stoakes
date: '2019-01-31'
slug: wrangling-the-academia-theme
categories:
  - Academia
  - Phonetics
tags:
  - Phonetics
header:
  caption: ''
  image: ''
  preview: yes
---

# The Academia Theme in Hugo

This is really just a test to see if I can get this post to show up on the site. I thought that I would play with a bit of **R** code while I have the chance.

The code below is from: [Fifty ways to draw a volcano using package plot3D](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/plot3D/vignettes/volcano.pdf) by Karline Soetaert

```{r setup}
# Preamble
library(plot3D)
# Reduce the resolution
 Volcano <- volcano[seq(1, nrow(volcano), by = 3),
                     seq(1, ncol(volcano), by = 3)]


```

```{r Plot}
image2D(Volcano, lighting = TRUE, rasterImage = TRUE,
     contour = list(col = "white", labcex = 0.8, lwd = 3, alpha = 0.5))
```
